---
title: "Margaret Jane Mowbray"
---

## Margaret Jane Mowbray

**Dates:** (1858-1926)

### Description

headmistress of Winchester High School

### Biography

She was one of many women signatories to a pro-suffrage article, ‘Women’s Suffrage: A Reply’ <i>Fortnightly Review</i>  46 (July 1889) 123-40. Her obituary (<i>The Times</i>  15 September 1926) states that she was headmistress 1885-1916.

### Letters

- [To Margaret Jane Mowbray, July 20, 1899.](../letters/3410_To_Margaret_Jane_Mowbray.html)

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
